# Inayath Basha - Entity Summary for LLMs

## Identity
- **Name:** Inayath Basha A
- **Roles:** Frontend Developer, Shopify Developer, UI/UX Designer, Brand Designer, Business Development Professional
- **Location:** Erode, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Contact:** Inayathbasha434@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://inayathbasha.vercel.app

## Bio & Mission
Creative Shopify Developer, UI/UX Designer, and Business Development Professional helping businesses grow through modern websites and digital solutions. Specializing in high-converting Shopify stores, custom theme development, speed optimization, and premium UI/UX design.

## Technical Skills
- **Frontend Core:** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Next.js, Vite
- **Styling & Animation:** Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP
- **Shopify Ecosystem:** Liquid, Shopify Theme Development, Store Setup, Optimization
- **Design:** UI/UX Design, Figma, Brand Design
- **AI & Emerging:** Generative AI, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion

## Key Projects
- **Mor Panthal:** A modern WordPress website for a traditional drink brand showcasing culture, health, and natural flavors.
- **Personal Portfolio:** A premium developer portfolio built with React and Tailwind CSS with high-performance animations and custom UI/UX.
- **AI Image Generation:** Commercial product visualizations and marketing assets created from raw camera captures using generative AI workflows (Stable Diffusion, Midjourney).
- **SmartCrop AI:** An AI-powered Agritech platform providing smart crop recommendations using a trained machine learning model, built with React and FastAPI/Python.

## Professional Offerings
Available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. Focuses on delivering premium, performance-optimized, and aesthetically superior digital experiences.
